title: iberis carnosa
intro: Iberis carnosa is a perennial flowering plant, also known as candytuft, which belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iberis carnosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Iberis carnosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
